---
title: "Day 2 - Block 1"
subtitle: "Ideation and Idea Validation"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B1"
---

## Objective

- Apply Stremersch ideation pipeline
- Move from ideas to tests
- Produce one micro artifact

## Inputs

- Stremersch (2024) ideation paper
- Your domain and collaborator map
- One target stakeholder context

## Core Moves (Stremersch 4S)

- Isolate -> immerse
- Few/narrow -> many/wide
- Late share -> early share

## Three-Phase Workflow

- Domain exploration
- Domain immersion
- Project design

## Deliverable

- One-page idea pipeline card
- 1 insight + 2 HMW prompts
- 1 falsifiable research question

## Timebox

- 20 min lecture input
- 30 min group build
- 10 min debrief

## Submission link

- `/docs/live-exercises?exercise=MICRO_D2B1`

## Evaluation rubric

- Relevance to stakeholder problem
- Falsifiability and testability
- Feasibility this semester

## Resource anchors

- R004, R009/R010, R022
- R038, R044/R045

## Extension task (optional)

- Add one dark-horse variant
- Add one kill criterion
